problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Combining Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
